summary: Experienced software engineer with 7+ years of experience in full-stack development, specializing in frontend technologies and UI/UX design. Passionate about creating intuitive, accessible user interfaces and optimizing web performance.

TechCorp.title: Senior Software Engineer
TechCorp.description: Developed responsive web applications using React and TypeScript, improving load times by 40%. Led a team of 5 engineers to redesign the company's main dashboard interface, resulting in a 25% increase in user engagement. Implemented comprehensive unit and integration testing, achieving 90% code coverage.

DataSystems Inc..title: Frontend Developer
DataSystems Inc..description: Created modular, reusable UI components with Vue.js and SCSS. Collaborated with UX designers to implement responsive designs across desktop and mobile platforms. Reduced bundle size by 35% through code splitting and lazy loading techniques. Mentored junior developers on best practices for frontend architecture.

WebFusion.title: Full Stack Developer
WebFusion.description: Built RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express, integrating with MongoDB and PostgreSQL databases. Implemented frontend interfaces using Angular. Participated in agile development processes, including daily standups and sprint planning.

CodeWorks.title: Junior Developer
CodeWorks.description: Maintained and updated legacy PHP applications. Assisted with migration to modern JavaScript frameworks. Developed internal tools to improve team productivity.
